agents.name: Clusternaut
agents.description: Uses K-Means clustering to classify 24-hour usage patterns into Eco, Moderate, and Peak zones.

agents.name: The Predictor
agents.description: Uses Naive Bayes Classifier to calculate P(Overload | Current_Load) and triggers Load Balance Requests when probability > 0.75.

agents.name: The Searcher
agents.description: Implements Greedy Best-First Search to find lowest-cost 1-hour window for heavy appliances based on Eco zones.

cluster_map.json.description: Map of hour-of-day to usage zone (Eco/Moderate/Peak)

reliability_sentinel_model.joblib.description: Trained Naive Bayes model for overload prediction

load_optimizer_recommendation.json.description: Recommendation for optimal heavy appliance scheduling
